subcodes.first_line: Upon thee be greetings and praise, O thou embodiment of the luminous and gracious Law, and exemplar of the straight Path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: علیک التحیه و الثناء یا نظام الشریعه السمحه البیضاء و نظام الطریقه القویمه
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @martyrs and martyrdom, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @visitation Tablets
